'''tolataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:puboischial|puboischial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puboischial|puboischial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tolataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tolatithi|tolatithi]] || [[word:tolatiji|tolatiji]] || [[word:tolatishi|tolatishi]] || [[word:tolatiki|tolatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tolatuthuthu|tolatuthuthu]] || [[word:tolatujuju|tolatujuju]] || [[word:tolatushushu|tolatushushu]] || [[word:tolatukuku|tolatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tolatuthu|tolatuthu]] || [[word:tolatuju|tolatuju]] || [[word:tolatushu|tolatushu]] || [[word:tolatuku|tolatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tolatufthuf|tolatufthuf]] || [[word:tolatufjuf|tolatufjuf]] || [[word:tolatufshuf|tolatufshuf]] || [[word:tolatufkuf|tolatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tolatethe|tolatethe]] || [[word:tolateje|tolateje]] || [[word:tolateshe|tolateshe]] || [[word:tolateke|tolateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tolatothotho|tolatothotho]] || [[word:tolatojojo|tolatojojo]] || [[word:tolatoshosho|tolatoshosho]] || [[word:tolatokoko|tolatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tolatotho|tolatotho]] || [[word:tolatojo|tolatojo]] || [[word:tolatosho|tolatosho]] || [[word:tolatoko|tolatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tolatofthof|tolatofthof]] || [[word:tolatofjof|tolatofjof]] || [[word:tolatofshof|tolatofshof]] || [[word:tolatofkof|tolatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfthĂŻf|tolatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfjĂŻf|tolatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfshĂŻf|tolatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfkĂŻf|tolatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|tolatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|tolatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|tolatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|tolatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfthĂŻf|tolatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfjĂŻf|tolatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfshĂŻf|tolatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfkĂŻf|tolatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfthĂŻf|tolatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfjĂŻf|tolatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfshĂŻf|tolatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tolatĂŻfkĂŻf|tolatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tolatĂŠthĂŠ|tolatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:tolatĂŠjĂŠ|tolatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:tolatĂŠshĂŠ|tolatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:tolatĂŠkĂŠ|tolatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tolatathatha|tolatathatha]] || [[word:tolatajaja|tolatajaja]] || [[word:tolatashasha|tolatashasha]] || [[word:tolatakaka|tolatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tolatatha|tolatatha]] || [[word:tolataja|tolataja]] || [[word:tolatasha|tolatasha]] || [[word:tolataka|tolataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tolatafthaf|tolatafthaf]] || [[word:tolatafjaf|tolatafjaf]] || [[word:tolatafshaf|tolatafshaf]] || [[word:tolatafkaf|tolatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tolatasha|tolatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tolatshĂ«sha|tolatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tolatrosha|tolatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tolatmusha|tolatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tolatyasha|tolatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotolatnkshĂ«sha|gotolatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotolatnkrosha|gotolatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotolatnkmusha|gotolatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotolatnkyasha|gotolatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tolalatasha|tolalatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tolalatshĂ«sha|tolalatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tolalatrosha|tolalatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tolalatmusha|tolalatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tolalatyasha|tolalatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotolalatnkshĂ«sha|gotolalatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotolalatnkrosha|gotolalatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotolalatnkmusha|gotolalatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotolalatnkyasha|gotolalatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:telĂŠtasha|telĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:telĂŠtshĂ«sha|telĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:telĂŠtrosha|telĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:telĂŠtmusha|telĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:telĂŠtyasha|telĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotelĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|gotelĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotelĂŠtnkrosha|gotelĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotelĂŠtnkmusha|gotelĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotelĂŠtnkyasha|gotelĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tolfatasha|tolfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tolfatshĂ«sha|tolfatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tolfatrosha|tolfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tolfatmusha|tolfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tolfatyasha|tolfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotolfatnkshĂ«sha|gotolfatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotolfatnkrosha|gotolfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotolfatnkmusha|gotolfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotolfatnkyasha|gotolfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
